calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Bevier appeared by telephone for Michael Balma (present in Court) and John Balma. Mary Mayo appeared by telephone for Robin Rhodes. Stephen Balma was also present.

Counsel disagree as to issue of whether they had entered into a stipulation/agreement. Mr. Balma explained that there was a large tax withholding from escrow for sale of the Geneva Avenue property and that each Beneficiary has to file a personal income tax. Mr. Bevier explained that the withholding is reflected in the escrow statement. The reserve amount was lowered from $50,000.00 to $20,000.00 (suggested amount by Mr. Balma). Ms. Bevier will provide the 2013 tax returns to Ms. Mayo. The Petition to Remove Co-Trustees, etc. was withdrawn by Ms. Mayo and is off calendar. The Parties agreed to take Accounting #1 off calendar. The final account was continued to July 22, 2014 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Bevier to file verification of the June 3, 2014 declaration and submit a proposed, and for Ms. Mayo to file withdrawal of her objections.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To May-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Robin Rhodes. Robin Bevier appeared by telephone for Michael Balma and John Balma (Co-Trustees).

Ms. Mayo stated that they are working things out, and requested a continuance until May to hopefully get the taxes done and terminate the Trust. Ms. Bevier stated that they reached a settlement agreement in June, that there is a property distribution plan and that all but $107,000.00 will be distributed to the Beneficiaries. Ms. Bevier also provided a breakdown as to the amounts each Beneficiary is to receive. The accounting petition and the petition to remove Co-Trustees, etc. were continued to May 12, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Bevier will appear by court call.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Michael Balma & John Balma As Co-Trustees For Breach Of Trust & Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To May-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Michael Balma & John Balma As Co-Trustees For Breach Of Trust & Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Michael Balma & John Balma As Co-Trustees For Breach Of Trust & Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Robin Rhodes (Petitioner). Robin Bevier appeared by telephone for and with Michael Balma (present in Court) and John Balma (present in Court). Steven Balma also present.

Counsel reported that mediation has not taken place. Ms. Bevier stated that she was fine with proceeding with Lawrence Siracusa as the Mediator, stated that she will provide Ms. Mayo with what ever information she is requesting (checks that haven't cleared, amended 1099, missing bank statements), that she will file a supplement to the accounting and that they plan to do an accounting from January 1st through March 31st. The Court directed Counsel to reserve a mediation date with Mr. Siracusa by March 29th, stated that it would be helpful for the Parties to clarify their positions prior to getting to mediation, suggested having a pre-mediation conference call with Mr. Siracusa to confirm how they are going to proceed, when briefs are to be filed, who will be in attendance, whether it will be okay to appear by phone and to include Steven. Mediation is to be completed by April 30, 2013 and the issue of payment of mediation is to be addressed with Mr. Siracusa. The Petition to Remove Co-Trustees for Breach of Trust and the Accounting Petition were continued to May 7, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner if mediation is not completed. If the matter is not settled by that date, the Court will refer the matter out to Department 206 for trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Michael Balma & John Balma As Co-Trustees For Breach Of Trust & Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Robin Rhodes (Petitioner/Beneficiary). Robin Bevier for and with John Balma and Michael Balma (Co-Trustees). Steve Balma (Co-Trustee).

Ms. Mayo stated that the parties has agreed to mediate the issues and that Michael Balma's powers are not suspended and that he is to make cash distribution of $1,000.00 per month to each residuary beneficiary for three months from January 2013 and including March 2013 and no further distributions. Mediation to be completed by March 25, 2013. The Petition for Removal and the First Account are continued to March 26, 2013 at 10:30 p.m. in Dept. 204. Ms. Bevier will appear by Court Call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Michael Balma & John Balma As Co-Trustees For Breach Of Trust & Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Robin Rhodes Balma (Petitioner). Robin Bevier for Mike Balma and John Balma (Co-Trustees). Steven Balma (other Co-Trustee) also present.

Ms. Bevier stated that the accounting is ready to be filed short of the required schedules, that she has no objection to appointment of a Probate Referee, that one of the properties was sold, that one is under contract for sale and that the third property is listed for sale. The Court suggested that the Parties agree upon a neutral Appraiser for the properties for "in kind" distributions. Ms. Bevier also stated that she could break down the accounting by parcels and that she will provide Notice of Proposed Action. in addition, Ms. Bevier stated that the Geneva Avenue property has 3 adresses, that the Mission Street property has 2 adresses and that she will not object to the issue of venue. The Petition to Remove Co-Trustees for Breach of Trust and Breach of Fiduciary Duty was continued to January 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the accounting petition was set for November 20, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting petition is to be filed with a hearing date of January 22, 2013.

e: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.
